title: Saudi Crumble Cake with Dates
description: A sweet and moist cake made with fermented milk, crumble topping, and sweet Saudi dates. Perfect for dessert.
instructions: Grease a 9-inch (23cm) round cake pan and set aside.
In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
Add the fermented milk and mix until just combined. Do not overmix.
Pour the batter into the prepared cake pan and smooth the top.
Sprinkle crumble topping evenly over the batter.
Dot the top with unsalted butter.
Bake for 40-45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
Remove from the oven and let cool in the pan for 10 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
